Name: Fiat
1Q: Who founded the Fiat company in 1899?
tip1: Giovanni Agnelli led the company since inception until his death.
2Q: In which Italian city was Fiat established?
tip2: As the name says: Fabbrica Italiana di Automobili Torino.
3Q: In how many units was the first Fiat 4 HP model produced?
tip3: The Fiat 4 HP is also known as the 3½HP or 3½CV.
4Q: Which Fiat first won the European Car of the Year award?
tip4: Fiat 124 won European Car of the Year award in 1966.
5Q: With whom Fiat formed the FCA group?
tip5: Fiat Chrysler Automobiles' corporate headquarters are in Amsterdam, and the financial headquarters are in London, both for tax purposes.
6Q: Which of the following brands was never owned by Fiat Group?
tip6: FCA also owns some industrial subsidiaries that are not car manufacturers.
7Q: Which is authorized tuning company specialized for upgrading Fiat models?
tip7: In the beginnings, Abarth & C. S.p.A. was independent racing and road car manufacturer.
8Q: Which of these Fiat was a convertible
tip8: Barchetta in Italian means little boat, and also denotes a type of open-top sports car body style.
9Q: In association with which luxury boat manufacturer Fiat designed the 500 units of the new Fiat 500?
tip9: Fiat 500 Riva features special Sera Blue exterior paint with ivory leather seats complemented by mahogany wood trim in the interior.
10Q: What role does a department within the company call FCA Heritage have?
tip10: The Heritage department was created to protect and value the past of Alfa Romeo, Fiat, Lancia and Abarth.
